sentences.target: Ich heize den Backofen schon mal vor.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhaɪ̯tsə deːn ˈbakʔoːfn̩ ʃoːn maːl foːɐ̯/

translations.de: Ich heize den Backofen schon mal vor.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhaɪ̯tsə deːn ˈbakʔoːfn̩ ʃoːn maːl foːɐ̯/
translations.en: I'll go ahead and preheat the oven.
translations.vi: Để mình làm nóng lò nướng trước.
translations.nl: Ik zal de oven vast voorverwarmen.
translations.hi: मैं ओवन पहले से गरम कर देता हूँ.
translations.ja: 先にオーブンを予熱しておくね。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense 1st person singular; part of separable verb 'vorheizen' (to preheat).
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; introduces the direct object.
Common noun; direct object of 'heize'.
Temporal/pragmatic adverb 'already'; often used with 'mal' for a softening/colloquial nuance.
Modal/colloquial particle (from 'einmal'); softens the statement together with 'schon'.
Separable verb particle completing 'heize' (vorheizen = to preheat); placed clause-finally in a main clause.

sentences.target: Der Backofen ist noch warm vom Pizzaabend.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ ˈbakʔoːfn̩ ɪst nɔx vaʁm fɔm ˈpɪtsaːˌʔaːbn̩t/

translations.de: Der Backofen ist noch warm vom Pizzaabend.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ ˈbakʔoːfn̩ ɪst nɔx vaʁm fɔm ˈpɪtsaːˌʔaːbn̩t/
translations.en: The oven is still warm from pizza night.
translations.es: El horno todavía está caliente de la noche de pizza.
translations.fr: Le four est encore chaud après la soirée pizza.
translations.it: Il forno è ancora caldo dopo la serata pizza.
translations.ko: 피자 파티하고 나서 오븐이 아직 따뜻해.
translations.zh-Hans: 昨晚烤披萨后，烤箱还热着。
translations.yue: 焗爐仲因為尋晚食薄餅而暖。
translations.ru: Духовка всё ещё тёплая после пиццовой вечеринки.
translations.pt: O forno ainda está quente da noite de pizza.
translations.vi: Lò nướng vẫn còn ấm sau tối ăn pizza.
translations.ar: الفرن ما زال دافئًا بعد ليلة البيتزا.
translations.nl: De oven is nog warm van de pizzavond.
translations.uk: Духовка ще тепла після вечора з піцою.
translations.hu: A sütő még meleg a pizzás este után.
translations.hi: पिज़्ज़ा नाइट के बाद ओवन अभी भी गरम है.
translations.pl: Piekarnik jest jeszcze ciepły po wieczorze z pizzą.
translations.el: Ο φούρνος είναι ακόμα ζεστός από τη βραδιά πίτσας.
translations.nb: Ovnen er fortsatt varm etter pizzakvelden.
translations.id: Oven masih hangat setelah malam pizza.
translations.sv: Ugnen är fortfarande varm efter pizzakvällen.
translations.ro: Cuptorul e încă cald după seara de pizza.
translations.cs: Trouba je ještě teplá po večeru s pizzou.
translations.da: Ovnen er stadig varm efter pizzaaftenen.
translations.fi: Uuni on yhä lämmin pizzaillan jäljiltä.
translations.ja: 昨夜ピザを焼いたから、オーブンはまだ温かい。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; marks the subject NP.
Common noun; head of the subject.
Copular auxiliary linking subject and predicative complement.
Temporal adverb indicating continuation of a state.
Predicative adjective functioning as the complement of the copula 'ist'.
Contraction of preposition 'von' + article 'dem'; introduces a dative PP expressing source/cause.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'vom' (dative), indicating the occasion/source.

sentences.target: Du kannst den Backofen bitte sauber machen.
sentences.reading: /duː kanst deːn ˈbakʔoːfn̩ ˈbɪtə ˈzaʊ̯bɐ ˈmaxn̩/

translations.de: Du kannst den Backofen bitte sauber machen.
translations.ipa: /duː kanst deːn ˈbakʔoːfn̩ ˈbɪtə ˈzaʊ̯bɐ ˈmaxn̩/
translations.fr: S'il te plaît, nettoie le four.
translations.vi: Làm ơn lau sạch lò nướng.
translations.ja: オーブンを掃除してね。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular nominative; subject.
Finite modal auxiliary, present tense 2nd person singular; selects an infinitive complement.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; introduces the direct object NP.
Common noun; direct object of the predicate 'sauber machen'.
Politeness/modal particle affecting the illocution of the request.
Predicative/resultative adjective specifying the desired state of the object with 'machen'.
Lexical verb in infinitive; complement of the modal 'kannst' and head of the resultative construction 'sauber machen'.

sentences.target: Im Backofen brennt leider etwas Käse an.
sentences.reading: /ɪm ˈbakʔoːfn̩ bʁɛnt ˈlaɪ̯dɐ ˈɛtvas ˈkɛːzə an/

translations.de: Im Backofen brennt leider etwas Käse an.
translations.ipa: /ɪm ˈbakʔoːfn̩ bʁɛnt ˈlaɪ̯dɐ ˈɛtvas ˈkɛːzə an/
translations.en: Some cheese is burning in the oven.
translations.es: Se está quemando un poco de queso en el horno.
translations.fr: Un peu de fromage est en train de brûler dans le four.
translations.it: Un po' di formaggio si sta bruciando nel forno.
translations.ko: 오븐 안에서 치즈가 좀 타고 있어.
translations.yue: 焗爐入面有啲芝士燶緊。
translations.pt: Tem um pouco de queijo queimando no forno.
translations.vi: Có chút phô mai đang bị cháy trong lò nướng.
translations.ar: هناك بعض الجبن يحترق في الفرن.
translations.nl: Er brandt wat kaas aan in de oven.
translations.hu: A sütőben odaég egy kis sajt.
translations.hi: ओवन में थोड़ा पनीर जल रहा है.
translations.pl: W piekarniku przypala się trochę sera.
translations.nb: Det brenner fast litt ost i ovnen.
translations.id: Ada sedikit keju yang mulai gosong di dalam oven.
translations.sv: Lite ost håller på att bränna fast i ugnen.
translations.ro: Se arde puțină brânză în cuptor.
translations.cs: V troubě se připaluje trochu sýra.
translations.da: Lidt ost er ved at brænde på i ovnen.
translations.ja: オーブンの中でチーズが少し焦げている。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of preposition 'in' + article 'dem'; introduces a dative PP indicating location.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'Im' (dative), specifying the location.
Finite main verb, present tense 3rd person singular; part of separable verb 'anbrennen' in this context.
Sentence adverb expressing the speaker's attitude.
Indefinite quantifier functioning as a determiner before the noun.
Common (mass) noun; grammatical subject of 'brennt ... an'.
Separable verb particle completing 'brennt' (anbrennen = to scorch/burn onto), placed clause-finally.

es: El horno todavía está caliente de la noche de pizza.
Se está quemando un poco de queso en el horno.

S'il te plaît, nettoie le four.
Un peu de fromage est en train de brûler dans le four.
it: Il forno è ancora caldo dopo la serata pizza.
Un po' di formaggio si sta bruciando nel forno.

yue: 焗爐仲因為尋晚食薄餅而暖。

pt: O forno ainda está quente da noite de pizza.

Làm ơn lau sạch lò nướng.

هناك بعض الجبن يحترق في الفرن.
nl: Ik zal de oven vast voorverwarmen.

hu: A sütő még meleg a pizzás este után.
A sütőben odaég egy kis sajt.

पिज़्ज़ा नाइट के बाद ओवन अभी भी गरम है.

W piekarniku przypala się trochę sera.

id: Oven masih hangat setelah malam pizza.

V troubě se připaluje trochu sýra.
